title: Yijing Hexagram 2: Kun (The Receptive)
description: Hexagram 2 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 2 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Receptive brings about sublime success, furthering through the perseverance of a mare. The earth's condition is receptive devotion. Thus the superior person carries the outer world with breadth of nature.
